# Beauty Sleep Studio PDX

> Portland's premier lash extension, lash lift, and brow lamination studio in the Nob Hill neighborhood. Licensed esthetician Haley has been perfecting lashes since 2008.

## Location
1308 NW 20th Ave, Suite 4, Portland, OR 97209
Nob Hill / Northwest Portland

## Contact
- Phone: 928-499-1270 (call or text)
- Email: beautysleepstudiopdx@gmail.com
- Book online: https://square.site/book/DYKA7NPF92BP7/beauty-sleep-studio-portland-or

## Hours
Tuesday–Friday: 10:00am–8:00pm
Monday, Saturday, Sunday: Closed

## Services
- Classic Lash Extensions: $180 (fills from $80)
- Hybrid Lash Extensions: $210 (fills from $90)
- Volume Lash Extensions: $260 (fills from $120)
- Lash Lift + Tint: $100
- Lash Lift Only: $85
- Lash Tint Only: $30
- Brow Lamination: Available (ask in booking notes)

## About
Haley is a licensed esthetician since 2008 specializing in lash extensions, lash lifts, and brow lamination in Portland, Oregon.

## Detailed info
- llms-full.txt: https://www.beautysleepstudiopdx.com/llms-full.txt
